subcodes.first_line: O ye believers, O ye steadfast ones! Though ye were exiled from Shahrood, yet praise be to God, ye have found refuge in your destined place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومنان ای موقنان هر چند از شاهرود مهجور شدید ولی الحمد لله در محل مورود
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
